title: anthemis pusilla subsp. liguliflora
intro: Anthemis pusilla subsp. liguliflora, also known as Dwarf Chamomile, is a low-growing, perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Dwarf Chamomile is valued for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which are attributed to its essential oil composition. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating menstrual cramps and insomnia. Dwarf Chamomile is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
